message: Node started: Given the entropy S(T, x) derived by the previous helper, apply the adiabatic condition (constant entropy, dS = 0) to find the relationship between temperature T and extension x. Then, use the first law of thermodynamics or the relation for adiabatic force F = -dU/dx (where U is internal energy) or F = T(dS/dx) at constant S to derive the force law F(x).
